title: Silicone Ashtrays 2 Pack Nonstick Cool Portable Ashtray for Outside Heat Resistant Won't Break Silicone Round Rubber Ash Tray Set for Home Office Restaurant or Outdoor (2 Black)
features: 【Portable Size】Ashtray size 8.3cm x 2.3cm / 3.27 inch x 0.91 inch (D x L), Weighs only 50g/0.11lb, fits easily in a pocket and that portable to bring ideal for camping or traveling.
【Premium Material】SOQKEEN pocket ashtrays is made of environmentally friendly material - silicone, won't easily break, resistant, washable, durable and can be easily folded.

【High Resistance】Silicone ashtrays resists temperatures up to 230°C / 446°F, Please avoid continuous contract between the bottom and unextinguished cigarette butts, otherwise it may be burned through.

【Versatile Use】Ashtray is compact and lightweight, suitable for use at home, garden, office, bar, restaurant, supermarket, outdoors and many more scenarios. When out and about, it can be carried in your pocket, handbag, backpack, sports bag, etc. for convenience and space saving. It can also be used to store keys, cards, earphones, coins, hair cards, glass and other small objects.
【Satisfaction Guaranteed】We stand behind the quality of our products and offer a 100% satisfaction guarantee. If you have any questions or concerns, please feel free to contact us directly via email.
description: Product Description SOQKEEN Silicone Ashtray Black 2 Pcs Flexible & Durable Silicone Ashtrays Made of soft and strong flexibility silicone material, versatile and durable, not be broken by external force or kneading, can return to its original state immediately. Also it is a good choice to exercise hand strength or as a cup mat when you no need to used it as a ash tray. Specification Lightweight of the silicone material ashtray with small size, make it very easily to put into your pants pocket, you can take it away and use it at any time. Material: Silicone Size: 8.3cm x 2.3cm (3.27inch x 0.91inch) Weight: 1.76 ounce/pcs (50 g/pcs) Colour: Black Shape: round Package: 2 Pack Food-grade High Temperature Resistant SOQKEEN silicone ashtrays are made of food grade, high temperature resistant silicone that can withstand temperatures up to 230°C / 446°F. A set of 2 can meet the various daily use needs of smokers. Silicone Ashtrays Suits for Everywhere Generally SOQKEEN Silicone ashtrays can be put any place as you like, coffee table, office desk, bathroom, bedroom etc. Silicone Ashtrays for Outdoor Travel Outdoor travel silicone ashtray, not as big and bulky as traditional ashtrays, small and lightweight, is your best choice for outdoor travel. Silicone Ashtrays in The Car Placing SOQKEEN silicone ashtrays in the car can bring convenience to passengers and drivers.
